name: ja_current_punctuation
reference: 日本点字表記法 2018年版（日本点字委員会）/ 点字一覧表（A42025 p.4）
_note: Japanese punctuation. Cells cross-checked against text sources AND the 日点委 official 点字一覧表 (A42025 page 4, read + calibrated against the alphabet). 句点 。=256, 読点 、=56, 疑問符 ？=26, 感嘆符 ！=235. NOTE sentence-final 。？！ technically take a two-cell gap (one cell mid-sentence); this table uses a single space_after. NOT yet included pending authoritative confirmation: brackets 「」（）, 中点 ・, 棒線/点線 (their 2-3-dot patterns weren't read with confidence). Re-verify against 日本点字表記法 2018 before final.
